Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Map event names Order Received vs OrderReceived Order Validated vs OrderValidation Payment Processed vs PaymentCheck Item Shipped vs Shipping

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Delivered missing in B keep as separate Also B has Quality Check not in A keep separate

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For merged events we can choose primary timestamp maybe from A or B

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use Log A timestamps as primary for merged events because it is considered primary timeline but include both timestamps

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Order Received and OrderReceived differ by 2 seconds within tolerance so merge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Order Validated and OrderValidation differ by 1 second within tolerance so merge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Payment Processed and PaymentCheck are treated as corresponding events and merged based on timing and naming similarity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Item Shipped and Shipping are treated as corresponding events and merged based on timing and naming similarity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Include all attributes from both logs for merged events and add source or origin field
